name: LLM Text Pro
description:
✨ Supercharge your clipboard with AI!

Fix grammar, improve text, translate between languages, or run any custom text action — all from a hotkey or automatically on copy. Supports 7 AI backends: Local API (Ollama, LM Studio), Online API (OpenRouter, OpenAI, Groq, Mistral), Gemini CLI, Claude CLI, Copilot CLI, Codex CLI, and OpenCode CLI.

✨ Features:
• Animated tray icon with live status
• 7 AI backends with per-action override
• Fully customisable actions — add, remove, enable/disable, change prompts & shortcuts
• Auto-action on copy — trigger actions automatically when you copy text
• Auto-paste result back into the active window
• Dynamic model fetching from Local API and OpenCode CLI
• Per-backend usage tracking (tokens, cost, call count)
• Transformation history with action queueing
